name: python3-django-restframework-guardian
title: python3-django-restframework-guardian
summary: django-guardian support for Django REST Framework (Python3 version)
description:
django-guardian support for Django REST Framework (Python3 version)
django-rest-framework-guardian provides django-guardian integrations for Django
REST Framework.
It provides an ObjectPermissionsFilter to which will ensure that querysets only
returns objects for which the user has the appropriate view permission and an
ObjectPermissionsAssignmentMixin that allows permissions to be easily assigned
to users and/or groups through serializers.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-django-restframework-guardian because django-guardian support for Django REST Framework (Python3 version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-django-restframework-guardian as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-django-restframework-guardian with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-django-restframework-guardian --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
